issues.description: Action type should be 'ForceDiscard' (trash from Life cards), not 'RemoveLife'. RemoveLife is for damage/life loss, not trashing Life cards.
Missing optional condition. Effect text states 'You may trash...' indicating an optional/conditional action, not mandatory. Should include a condition or make action optional.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is reasonable but should verify maxCost constraint is properly enforced. 'up to 1' suggests optional targeting which may need explicit cardinality.
